The Stade de France Stadium, which seats roughly 77,083 individuals, will host the track and field competition starting on Thursday for the 2024 Paris Olympic Games.

Some of the biggest stars like Noah Lyles, Sha'Carri Richardson, Jakob Ingebrigsten, Mondo Duplantis, and others will face the stiffest competition of their careers so far this season.

There have been social media posts across Instagram of track and field athletes celebrating the start of the Games during the opening ceremony. In today's world, many people want to stay connected to the top stars competing over the next 10 days.

Here are the Instagram handles of top track and field competitors at the 2024 Paris Olympic Games. Don't forget to followFlotrack on Instagram, along withAshley Tysiac,Bryan DeibelandRyan Fentonas they will be on the ground in Paris covering the event.

title: The Top Track Athletes To Follow At The 2024 Paris Olympics On Instagram - FloTrack
description: Here are the top track and field athletes competing at the 2024 Paris Olympic Games and how you can connect with them on Instagram.
